allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/industries" -Method Get | ConvertTo-Json } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"master@roadmate.com","password":"password123"}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
